articles.title: A Falcon 9 booster turns five years old—and just set a remarkable reuse record - Ars Technica
articles.description: We take the Falcon 9 rocket for granted. But we probably shouldn't.

articles.title: NotebookLM’s new update will help you build source repository from chat - TechCrunch
articles.description: Google is making Gemini 3.5 the default model in NotebookLM
articles.content: Google on Monday announced an update to its NotebookLM research tool, which includes new features and the shift to Gemini 3.5 as the default model. The company is also adding Antigravity-powered soft… [+1663 chars]
